all.critique:
Below is a summary of the issues I found with the logic analysis, along with the functions or steps they affect and an assessment of their severity:

1. Positional Embedding Modification Ambiguity (High Severity)  
 • The analysis notes that positional embeddings may be modified “before starting the iterations or during the iterations” but leaves the timing and mechanism unclear.  
 • This affects the diffusion sampling loop (model.forward calls) and the helper function(s) responsible for applyi
